entries.finding: M8R-03E context package includes AI behavior fields in evidence artifacts.
entries.recommended_action: Add schema migration to evidence-oriented fields and move behavior guidance to Agent Skill/deployment policy.
entries.risk: Agent behavior remains coupled to evidence package compatibility fields.

entries.finding: Output-root safety rejects URLs and some names but does not prove symlink escape or absolute-path containment.
entries.recommended_action: Centralize safe path resolution, symlink checks, and output root containment.
entries.risk: Unsafe artifact placement may be possible if new trust-boundary surfaces are added before containment hardening; documentation/Skill-only Phase B is not blocked.

entries.finding: Oversized modules and functions mix builder, validation, CLI, and projection responsibilities.
entries.recommended_action: Split by responsibility after Phase B scope is stable.
entries.risk: Maintenance risk and duplicate semantics grow across layers.

entries.finding: Wildcard imports remain in runtime modules.
entries.recommended_action: Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports.
entries.risk: Implicit APIs obscure dependencies and type boundaries.

entries.finding: Potential repeated canonical serialization, citation scans, and schema validation under high citation/missing-evidence pressure.
entries.recommended_action: Completed benchmark foundation and validator caching; defer schema-valid 10-target fixture, real 50/100 scaling, pressure fixtures, and closure to R5A.
entries.risk: Large watchlists may show superlinear behavior.

entries.finding: Gaps remain for duplicate JSON keys, symlink/path safety, deep nesting, large inputs, and schema-version compatibility.
entries.recommended_action: Add targeted security/compatibility/property-style tests without heavy dependencies.
entries.risk: Edge cases can regress outside fixture happy paths.

entries.finding: Historical documents still contain active-sounding successor and AI behavior policy language.
entries.recommended_action: Add lifecycle labels and archive hierarchy in bounded documentation cleanup.
entries.risk: Readers may confuse historical guardrails with post-M8C architecture.
